task_completion.description: Context Diagram (Level 0) is created with the central APT System process and four specific external entities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a diagram canvas (likely Page 1) showing a central process labeled 'APT System' connected to four external entity shapes labeled 'System Administrator', 'Package Repository', 'GPG Keyserver', and 'Installed System'.

task_completion.description: Level 1 DFD is created on a second page with the five required processes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a second diagram canvas (Page 2) showing process shapes (usually circles or rounded rectangles) labeled 'Parse Sources', 'Fetch Metadata', 'Resolve Dependencies', 'Download Packages', and 'Verify & Install'.

task_completion.description: Level 1 DFD includes the four required data stores.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Level 1 DFD canvas for data store shapes (usually open-ended rectangles or parallel lines) labeled 'Sources List', 'Package Lists', 'Package Cache', and 'dpkg Status' (or 'dpkg Status DB').

task_completion.description: The complete diagram is saved as 'apt_dfd.drawio' on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the filename 'apt_dfd.drawio' in the title bar of the Drawio application, or an icon with this name on the Desktop or in a File Manager window viewing the Desktop.

task_completion.description: The Level 1 DFD is exported as 'apt_dfd.png' to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an image file named 'apt_dfd.png' on the Desktop or in a File Manager window, or an image viewer displaying the exported Level 1 DFD.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical diagramming tool (like Drawio) to create the diagrams.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Drawio application interface with toolbars, shape libraries, and a canvas, rather than terminal commands generating files directly.

integrity.description: The agent constructed the diagram using individual shapes and text rather than pasting a pre-made image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for selected shapes with resize handles, connection lines snapping to anchor points, or the agent actively dragging and dropping shapes from the library.

integrity.description: The output files are genuinely saved to the Desktop environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the actual file icons for 'apt_dfd.drawio' and 'apt_dfd.png' on the GUI Desktop or within a GUI file explorer, not just listed in a terminal 'ls' output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires a 2-page DFD saved as 'apt_dfd.drawio' and a PNG export named 'apt_dfd.png'. Page 1 (Context Diagram) must have the central 'APT System' process and 4 entities: System Administrator, Package Repository, GPG Keyserver, Installed System. Page 2 (Level 1 DFD) must have 5 processes (Parse Sources, Fetch Metadata, Resolve Dependencies, Download Packages, Verify & Install) and 4 data stores (Sources List, Package Lists, Package Cache, dpkg Status DB).
